name: Magento
description: Connect your Magento store to manage products, orders, customers, and e-commerce operations

get_product_by_sku.label: Get Product by SKU
get_product_by_sku.description: Get detailed information about a product by its SKU (Stock Keeping Unit)

get_product_by_id.label: Get Product by ID
get_product_by_id.description: Get detailed information about a product by its numeric ID

search_products.label: Search Products
search_products.description: Search for products using a query term with pagination support

advanced_product_search.label: Advanced Product Search
advanced_product_search.description: Search for products with advanced filtering options and custom field criteria

get_product_categories.label: Get Product Categories
get_product_categories.description: Get all categories for a specific product by SKU

get_related_products.label: Get Related Products
get_related_products.description: Get products related to a specific product by SKU

get_product_stock.label: Get Product Stock
get_product_stock.description: Get stock information for a product by SKU

get_product_attributes.label: Get Product Attributes
get_product_attributes.description: Get all attributes (base and custom) for a product by SKU

update_product_attribute.label: Update Product Attribute
update_product_attribute.description: Update a specific attribute of a product by SKU

get_revenue.label: Get Revenue
get_revenue.description: Get the total revenue for a given date range with status filtering

get_revenue_by_country.label: Get Revenue by Country
get_revenue_by_country.description: Get revenue filtered by country for a given date range

get_order_count.label: Get Order Count
get_order_count.description: Get the number of orders for a given date range with status filtering

get_product_sales.label: Get Product Sales
get_product_sales.description: Get statistics about the quantity of products sold in a given date range with country and status filtering

get_customer_ordered_products_by_email.label: Get Customer Ordered Products by Email
get_customer_ordered_products_by_email.description: Get all ordered products for a customer by email address with detailed product information

baseUrl.label: Magento Base URL
baseUrl.description: Your Magento 2 REST API base URL (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/rest/V1)

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.description: Magento API token (create in System > Integrations)
